'''âf-d-h''' ('''kafadah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jawmaxx|jawmaxx]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-d-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jawmaxx|jawmaxx]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-d-h
|-
! Lemma
| kafadah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifadah|thifadah]] || [[word:jifadah|jifadah]] || [[word:shifadah|shifadah]] || [[word:kifadah|kifadah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufadah|thuthufadah]] || [[word:jujufadah|jujufadah]] || [[word:shushufadah|shushufadah]] || [[word:kukufadah|kukufadah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufadah|thufadah]] || [[word:jufadah|jufadah]] || [[word:shufadah|shufadah]] || [[word:kufadah|kufadah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufadah|thufadah]] || [[word:jufadah|jufadah]] || [[word:shufadah|shufadah]] || [[word:kufadah|kufadah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefadah|thefadah]] || [[word:jefadah|jefadah]] || [[word:shefadah|shefadah]] || [[word:kefadah|kefadah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofadah|thothofadah]] || [[word:jojofadah|jojofadah]] || [[word:shoshofadah|shoshofadah]] || [[word:kokofadah|kokofadah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofadah|thofadah]] || [[word:jofadah|jofadah]] || [[word:shofadah|shofadah]] || [[word:kofadah|kofadah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofadah|thofadah]] || [[word:jofadah|jofadah]] || [[word:shofadah|shofadah]] || [[word:kofadah|kofadah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠfadah|thĂŠfadah]] || [[word:jĂŠfadah|jĂŠfadah]] || [[word:shĂŠfadah|shĂŠfadah]] || [[word:kĂŠfadah|kĂŠfadah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafadah|thathafadah]] || [[word:jajafadah|jajafadah]] || [[word:shashafadah|shashafadah]] || [[word:kakafadah|kakafadah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafadah|thafadah]] || [[word:jafadah|jafadah]] || [[word:shafadah|shafadah]] || [[word:kafadah|kafadah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafadah|thafadah]] || [[word:jafadah|jafadah]] || [[word:shafadah|shafadah]] || [[word:kafadah|kafadah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafadah|shafadah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafadah|goshafadah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafadah|gokishafadah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafadahnĂŒ|shafadahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafadahnknĂŒ|goshafadahnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafadahnĂŒ|gokishafadahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafadahshĂ«|shafadahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafadahnkshĂ«|goshafadahnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafadahshĂ«|gokishafadahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafadahro|shafadahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafadahnkro|goshafadahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafadahro|gokishafadahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafadahmu|shafadahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafadahnkmu|goshafadahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafadahmu|gokishafadahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafadahsher|shafadahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafadahnksher|goshafadahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafadahsher|gokishafadahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafadahng|shafadahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafadahnkng|goshafadahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafadahng|gokishafadahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafadahya|shafadahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafadahnkya|goshafadahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafadahya|gokishafadahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafadahyam|shafadahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafadahnkyam|goshafadahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafadahyam|gokishafadahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafadahnĂŒshĂ«|shafadahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafadahnknĂŒshĂ«|goshafadahnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafadahnĂŒshĂ«|gokishafadahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafadahnĂŒro|shafadahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafadahnknĂŒro|goshafadahnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafadahnĂŒro|gokishafadahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafadahnĂŒmu|shafadahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafadahnknĂŒmu|goshafadahnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafadahnĂŒmu|gokishafadahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafadahshĂ«nĂŒ|shafadahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafadahnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshafadahnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafadahshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishafadahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafadahshĂ«ro|shafadahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafadahnkshĂ«ro|goshafadahnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafadahshĂ«ro|gokishafadahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafadahshĂ«mu|shafadahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafadahnkshĂ«mu|goshafadahnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafadahshĂ«mu|gokishafadahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafadahronĂŒ|shafadahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafadahnkronĂŒ|goshafadahnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafadahronĂŒ|gokishafadahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafadahroshĂ«|shafadahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafadahnkroshĂ«|goshafadahnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafadahroshĂ«|gokishafadahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafadahromu|shafadahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafadahnkromu|goshafadahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafadahromu|gokishafadahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafadahmunĂŒ|shafadahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafadahnkmunĂŒ|goshafadahnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafadahmunĂŒ|gokishafadahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafadahmushĂ«|shafadahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafadahnkmushĂ«|goshafadahnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafadahmushĂ«|gokishafadahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafadahmuro|shafadahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafadahnkmuro|goshafadahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafadahmuro|gokishafadahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
